narrative: Trump comments on ending the Iran conflict and wiping out their Navy introduce a geopolitical risk premium — WTI surges 3.13% toward $100 while USD/JPY firms to 157.12 on 300bp Fed-BoJ carry; gold higher +0.02% near $4,732; equities +0.40%; DXY +0.02%; VIX 18.1. GBP/JPY bilateral divergence (+1.047% spread) anchors G8 flows as BoE-BoJ 300bp carry favors the pound. Watch RBNZ Rate Decision on May 27.
